SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.api14c

Class Api14cSafetyAnalysisTable

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.api14c.Api14cSafetyAnalysisTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class Api14cSafetyAnalysisTable extends Object implements Serializable
API RP 14C / ISO 10418 Safety Analysis Table - the canonical mapping from Api14cEquipmentCategory to the mandatory set of Api14cDeviceTypes.

The default table reflects the prescriptive minimum-device list of API RP 14C, Appendix A. Project deviations should be documented separately; this class is intentionally read only after construction.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
